positive: A highly detailed, stylized celestial fox spirit (kitsune) portrait. The fox has an elegant, ethereal silhouette, appearing semi-translucent, surrounded by nebula dust and cosmic energy. The background is a deep indigo and violet galaxy swirl, contrasting sharply with vibrant neon teal and gold accents illuminating the fox's tails and mystical markings. Composition should be central and symmetrical, designed for apparel printing. High contrast, smooth illustration style, digital painting, clean lines, perfect symmetry, volumetric lighting, octane render, intricate details, mythic and enchanting atmosphere.
negative: blurry, messy, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, jpeg compression, bad anatomy, extra limbs, mutated, noise, grain, signature, out of frame
